name: Katie McGinty
subject: Orlando
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8304746439968292864/-6271802341322653696?refcode=e20160612)
---
Friends,

The deadly act of terrorism in Orlando last night is a national tragedy felt by all of us. Today, I extend a special thought and prayer to the families of those killed and injured.

This is the worst mass shooting in American history -- but it is not the first. It's one more heartbreaking reminder that hatred and violence leads us to grief and sadness. It's one more reminder that things must change.

This morning, after hearing the news, I marched in the Pittsburgh LGBT Pride Parade. It was a heartening moment to be among so many people -- of all orientations, genders, and backgrounds -- coming together after such a tragedy. This is the spirit we must look to.

There is still much to be learned about what happened and why, but today let's think about those we lost and extend our sympathies to the families of Orlando.

Thank you,

Katie
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8304746439968292864/-6343859935360581632).

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

name: Eric Greitens
subject: Terrorist Attack
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greitens for Missouri, Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer
body:
Peter,

Once again, we saw the evil of radical Islamic terrorism rear its ugly head here at home.

This was a horrifying and tragic attack on Americans, with the terrorist clearly targeting members of the gay and lesbian community. Our thoughts and prayers are with the victims and their families, and our thanks are with the brave law enforcement officers who put themselves in danger to kill this terrorist.

The Islamic State (ISIS) has claimed responsibility for this attack, and we can’t stand by and allow this act to go unanswered. This is a sickening and very real reminder of the new daily threat we face in the war against terror. Radical Islamic terrorists are set on killing Americans, and many are willing and encouraged to carry out these attacks against us at home.

This could have happened in any community, against any group. Terror knows no borders and they will try to make our home their battlefield. We must act immediately and swiftly to keep our country safe.

As a Navy SEAL, I fought against this evil in the War on Terror. I know that this battle will require tremendous courage and sacrifice, and that in the end we will prevail.

Eric

Paid for by Greitens for Missouri, Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer

4579 Laclede Avenue #138 — St. Louis, Missouri 63108

This email was sent to dpwillis67+greitens@gmail.com. Unsubscribe http://links.ericgreitens.com/asm/unsubscribe/?user_id=2167711&data=-y_V5MeKTlF_HR9MAUJPLDItwVRwCEWNisyrvk4EwVtixxsUFltSpSIbPJdsN8b5wkUTa6OeL5P8xRR_XaFqLjZDKoVkBeQCiAey9pIeE_QdCQ_Z7xRo96D3e8OVtf4894ZcY9CFUbegizS7BFdgGfMrbT6QD6dj0wG4LGcgGflgCcO2qrgaktt3wKUoOMm9LBfTWBMCin9CVFXhcS07McMpeyQDZly_OHuN7r-zfKCWwo0eB8vyZhe5OZ8VX4djq5rA8c1r6GTHJSXUPFDXIq2gCjtyp-sAIaPQ_OYxnCXPSTdZ067l3v4PdpuoopW08YgRXXzp5329WZEd87r5TY4ypv4tNmS0vFXOY1jP-MHm9lA6rPs4crCz56qzNbns-wvXLXzfSz36SHcdyIJ8svoyjHxR-XU3Jq32SGAxFTeyKg1rXbbKiPbYlIdIV4lw3QD95t5hv5CH32ktAcyGWwDlL4VKzNZ6OAnyl5tZR-_OktS6DzN63TS7vLWiWcUY0WwXa7BR6jqmc-67M1yMhhMoXFwE8pkJmmTScuGtm7-PmUMj2UR2z4TXw3TTM4jRwLFNpHIb1fgA_yx7s67_Qg==

subject: Join Us in Greensboro, NC Tuesday!
body:
| | [](http://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/?e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=greensboro2&n=1)

# [www.DonaldJTrump.com ](//www.donaldjtrump.com)
---
|
---
\- JUNE 12th 2016 -
JOIN US IN GREENSBORO, NC TUESDAY!
| Dear Peter,

We are excited to announce that Donald J. Trump and team are headed to Greensboro, North Carolina this Tuesday, June 14th, for a Donald J. Trump for President rally and we want you to join us! Details about the event are below:

**Tuesday, June 14th: Greensboro, NC
** Greensboro Coliseum Complex
1921 W Gate City Boulevard
Greensboro, NC 27403
Doors Open: 4:00 PM
Event Begins: 7:00 PM
Register for tickets by [clicking here](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.donaldjtrump.com%2Fschedule%2Fregister%2Fgreensboro-nc%2F&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=greensboro2&n=2).[

](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.donaldjtrump.com%2Fschedule%2Fregister%2Fredding-california%2F&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=greensboro2&n=3) Please limit personal items and arrive early to expedite entrance into the venue - please note, **NO homemade signs, banners, professional cameras with a detachable lens, tripods, monopods, selfie sticks, back packs or large bags will be permitted into the venue.**

We hope to see you there! Sincerely,

Team Trump

* * *

TEXT **TRUMP** TO **88022** TO GET EXCLUSIVE UPDATES ***By participating, you consent to receiving automated text messages from the campaign. Standard messaging rates apply.***

[Click Here ](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.donaldjtrump.com%2Fdonate%2F&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=greensboro2&n=4)To Stand With Donald Trump and
MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!

P.S. If you would like to purchase official campaign gear, [click here](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fshop.donaldjtrump.com&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=greensboro2&n=5).
